tier_definitions.top_tier: Baseball PnL >= $500 (Wallet 360 15d, Sports / Baseball / MLB category)
tier_definitions.watchlist: Baseball PnL < $500 but > $0, or MLB trades detected with low activity
tier_definitions.dormant_mlb: Has baseball category on Wallet 360 but no MLB trades in last 90 days
tier_definitions.sports_only: Sports trader with no baseball/MLB category detected
